legal_records: 2023-09: Small claims dispute filed by buyer (Order #CPN-9921) — resolved in seller's favor after 14 days.
2024-01: No active litigation found in Seoul Central District Court records.
2024-11: Trademark registration approved for brand 'SeoulTech' under class 9.
financial_signals: Payroll tax filings consistent for 6 consecutive quarters (NTS records, Q1 2023 – Q2 2024).
VAT return submitted on time for all 8 reporting periods since incorporation.
No record of bounced supplier payments in Korea Federation of SMEs database.
Estimated annual revenue band: ₩2.1B – ₩3.4B (sourced from DART supplementary filings).
executive_changes: No CEO change recorded since founding in 2017.
CFO appointment: Park So-yeon (2022-06), replacing retiring CFO Choi Byung-il.
platform_metrics: Coupang seller rating: 4.7 / 5.0 (based on 12,450 verified reviews).
Top 3% seller badge held continuously since 2021.
naver_sentiment: Naver blog post (2024-10-02): '서울텍 전자에서 주문한 노트북 정말 빠르게 왔어요. 포장도 꼼꼼하고 AS도 친절합니다!' (Translation: Fast delivery, careful packaging, friendly after-sales service.)
Naver cafe review (2024-08-15): '가격 대비 품질이 너무 좋아요. 재구매 의사 있습니다.' (Translation: Excellent quality for the price. Will repurchase.)
Naver blog (2024-11-20): '고객센터 응답이 조금 느린 편이지만 제품 자체는 만족합니다.' (Translation: Customer service response is a bit slow but satisfied with the product itself.)

legal_records: 2023-04: Consumer dispute escalated to Korea Consumer Agency — seller failed to respond within mandatory 7-day window. Ruling: partial refund ordered.
2023-11: Second consumer complaint filed. Status: under mediation.
2024-03: Small claims court filing (Case #2024-소-00341) — plaintiff alleges counterfeit goods. Case ongoing.
2024-07: Korea Fair Trade Commission (KFTC) issued advisory warning regarding misleading product descriptions.
financial_signals: VAT return missed for Q3 2023 — penalty notice issued by NTS.
Supplier payment dispute logged with Korea Credit Bureau (KCB) in 2024-02.
No DART filings found — company below disclosure threshold but revenue signals inconsistent.
Estimated annual revenue band: ₩180M – ₩340M, showing declining trend YoY.
executive_changes: CEO changed from Park Min-jun to Lee Soo-jin in 2023-08 — abrupt transition, no press release.
CFO position currently vacant as of last public record (2024-05).
platform_metrics: Naver Smart Store rating: 3.2 / 5.0 (based on 1,820 reviews).
Store warning badge issued by Naver for policy violations (2024-09).
naver_sentiment: Naver blog (2024-09-10): '제품이 사진과 완전히 달라요. 환불도 안 해줘서 너무 화가 납니다.' (Translation: Product looks nothing like the photos. They refused to refund. Very angry.)
Naver cafe (2024-10-01): '배송이 3주나 걸렸는데 연락도 없었어요. 다시는 구매 안 합니다.' (Translation: Took 3 weeks to ship with no communication. Never buying again.)
Naver blog (2024-11-05): '가품 의심됩니다. 정품 인증서 요청했는데 묵묵부답이에요.' (Translation: Suspected counterfeit. Requested authenticity certificate but got no response.)

legal_records: No litigation records found in any district court database.
Export license to Japan and Singapore active as of 2024-Q3.
financial_signals: Consistent VAT and payroll tax filings for all 9 years of operation.
DART filing (2023 annual): Revenue ₩8.7B, Net profit margin 11.2%.
Credit rating: A- (Korea Credit Bureau, issued 2024-06).
No supplier payment disputes on record.
executive_changes: CEO Choi Yeon-soo has led company since founding in 2015.
Board expanded in 2023 with appointment of two independent directors.
platform_metrics: Kakao Commerce rating: 4.9 / 5.0 (based on 34,200 verified reviews).
Featured as Kakao Commerce 'Excellence Award' winner 2022 and 2023.
naver_sentiment: Naver blog (2024-10-15): '부산 신선식품은 진짜 믿을 수 있는 업체예요. 매주 주문합니다.' (Translation: Busan Fresh Foods is truly trustworthy. I order every week.)
Naver cafe (2024-11-02): '신선도가 정말 놀랍습니다. 마트보다 훨씬 좋아요.' (Translation: Freshness is truly impressive. Much better than supermarkets.)
Naver blog (2024-09-28): '선물용으로 보냈는데 포장이 너무 예뻐서 받은 분들이 다들 좋아했어요.' (Translation: Sent as a gift — the packaging was so beautiful that everyone loved it.)
